title: FunnyChapter
subtitle: A Playful Captcha Collection
description: An open-source captcha collection covering five categories — interactive, recognize, creative, mini-game and anti-bot satire. Available via npm package, script embed, or source copy.

creative.label: Creative
creative.desc: Emoji match, meme quiz — out-of-the-box ideas

game.label: Mini Game
game.desc: Pass a level or score enough to proceed

anti-bot.label: Anti-Bot Satire
anti-bot.desc: Deliberately lets bots inject JS to pass — irony
